# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users-upstream:8080
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        paths:
          - /api/users
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders-upstream:8080
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        paths:
          - /api/orders
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false

  - name: inventory-service
    url: http://inventory-upstream:8080
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        paths:
          - /api/inventory
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false

  - name: payments-service
    url: http://payments-upstream:8080
    routes:
      - name: payments-route
        paths:
          - /api/payments
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    targets:
      - target: users-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    targets:
      - target: orders-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    targets:
      - target: inventory-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3

  - name: payments-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    targets:
      - target: payments-1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: payments-2.internal:8080
        weight: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
